hero.title: ATS — hiring software that actually works the way Egyptian teams do
hero.subtitle: Job postings, applications, interviews, offers, and contracts — one system, no spreadsheets, no WhatsApp chases.

software.title: Hiring software your team will actually use
software.subtitle: Built because the tools on the market cost too much for what they do.

items.name: ATS
items.line: You'll know you need it the day a candidate falls through a WhatsApp group and nobody notices for a week.

features.title: Custom job forms
features.desc: Add the fields each role needs — text, numbers, dropdowns, files, checkboxes — and get a link to share on LinkedIn, Facebook, or your own site.

features.title: Pipeline & filters
features.desc: Filter applicants across every field, not just name and status. Move candidates through custom statuses with reason tracking.

features.title: Interview scoring
features.desc: Schedule with date picker, video link, and scored questions. Set a pass threshold so decisions are objective, not gut feel.

features.title: Offers & contracts
features.desc: Build from reusable templates with drag-and-drop sections. Send offers by email with tracking, download contracts as PDF.

features.title: Email tracking
features.desc: Know when emails are sent, delivered, opened, clicked, or bounced. Every message logged per applicant.

features.title: Activity timeline
features.desc: Every status change, interview, offer, contract, and comment in one scrollable timeline per applicant.

features.title: Multi-company & RBAC
features.desc: Manage multiple companies from one account. Assign users to specific companies and departments with granular permissions.

features.title: Bulk actions
features.desc: Change status, send emails, or schedule interviews for dozens of applicants at once.

closing.title: Tell us what you need
closing.subtitle: Pricing, a feature question, or just a thought — we read everything that comes in.
